# Community Prospecting Map

Owner: `organic-traffic-strategist`

```yaml
community_prospecting_map:
  id: cpm-YYYYMMDD-slug
  product_bet_revision_ref:
  owner: organic-traffic-strategist
  created_at:
```

## Communities

```yaml
communities:
  reddit:
    subreddits:
      - name:
        url:
        rules_checked: yes | no
        promotion_policy:
        expected_fit: low | medium | high
  hacker_news:
    algolia_queries:
    relevant_threads:
  indie_hackers:
  product_hunt:
  x_search:
  niche_forums:
```

## Candidate Threads

```yaml
candidate_threads:
  - thread_id:
    platform:
    url:
    title:
    intent_score: 0
    spam_or_reputation_risk: 0
    freshness:
    allowed_engagement: help_only | soft_mention | direct_mention | no_engagement
    recommended_reply_angle:
```

Rules:

- No astroturfing.
- No fake endorsements.
- No vote manipulation.
- No public posting without approval.
